title: Pop!
description: This plugin adds a pop sound effect when a player logs in our out.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.figbash.com/i/pop-logo.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/EH8oJUeY9qA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This is a simple plugin that adds the pickup pop sound when players log in or out at that location. It can make for some very funny moments if playing with friends

> Config

```
# ====================================
# Hey you! Thanks for using my plugin. I created it for the server https://crafters.one/
# We're a small whitelisted vanilla SMP with a permanent map, generated on Jan 28th, 2021 to never reset.
#
# You can join us at https://crafters.one/discord/ or see more plugins here:
# https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/authors/plexiate.117947/
# ====================================

# Chat prefix for all messages sent by this plugin
prefix: "&8[&aPop!&8]&r "

default:
  join-sound: ENTITY_ITEM_PICKUP
  quit-sound: ENTITY_ITEM_PICKUP

volume:
  join: 0.3
  quit: 0.3

# Custom player sounds
custom:
  override: true # Enable or disable all custom sounds
  users:
    Plexiate:
      join: BLOCK_BEACON_ACTIVATE
      quit: BLOCK_BEACON_DEACTIVATE
      join-volume: 0.5
      quit-volume: 0.5
```



Email: hi@plexiate.com
